title: Felineification 16x
description: 16x texture pack with over 100+ original textures, including low fire, custom cat-themed effect icons, GUI, and more :3
body:
# Felineification 16x
![A preview of some of the felineification 16x textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wINFOofk/images/c3385378416e77279b7d347194c0c25f73dc7243.png)
##
**Felineification** is a resource pack redesigning many blocks and items for a decorative cat theme with some pvp elements :3 
##
## Features
- 100+ custom textures 
- original hotbar and inventory GUI 
- cats
- cat-themed potion effect icons
- outlined ores, low fire, and no fire overlay
- cats
- and more! 
##
Please note that this is **unfinished**, and this resource pack no longer has any planned updates at the moment!
##
<details>
<summary>Usage</summary>
You may edit, modify, reupload, and use in media for non-commercial use. Credit should be provided if possible.
</details>
